name: DINX Social Club
description: DINX Social Club is THE Premier Indoor Pickleball, Golf & Karaoke Lounge on Chicago’s North Shore! DINX is OPEN TO THE PUBLIC and does not require a Membership, although Memberships are offered for additional discounts and perks. DINX offers 6 pro cushioned pickleball courts, 3 Trackman Golf Simulators, a Private Karaoke Lounge and 2 additional lounges. DINX features the largest self pour wall in the area with premium spirits, wines, beer and handcrafted cocktails and mocktails. The staff is top notch creating a five star experience!
